name: virtualagency-os-site
description: Static site + insights generator for virtualagency-os.com

scripts.build: npm run query:atlas && node scripts/add_answer_schema.js && node scripts/build_insights.js && node scripts/apply_fanout.js && node scripts/normalize_clean_canonicals.js && node scripts/update_redirects_clean_to_html.js && node scripts/update_sitemap_all_html.js && npm run release:plan
scripts.build:seo: npm run query:atlas && node scripts/add_answer_schema.js && node scripts/update_redirects_clean_to_html.js && node scripts/update_sitemap_all_html.js && npm run release:plan
scripts.release:autonomous: npm run query:atlas && npm run citation:collect-free && npm run citation:normalize-artifacts && npm run opportunities:score && npm run release:plan && npm run release:content && npm run build && npm run citation:compile-artifact && npm run release:reports && npm run validate:autonomous && npm run validate:release && npm run validate:all
scripts.release:postpush: npm run build && npm run actions:validate && npm run credentials:check && npm run query:test:zero-cost && npm run validate:autonomous
scripts.release:prepush:container: node scripts/attest_prepush_profile.js container_structural && npm run release:self-heal
scripts.release:prepush:local: node scripts/attest_prepush_profile.js local && npm run release:self-heal
scripts.release:self-heal: npm run build && npm run actions:validate && npm run citation:normalize-artifacts && npm run citation:compile-artifact && npm run release:reports && npm run release:deep-validate:isolated && npm run validate:all
scripts.validate:all: npm run validate:governance && node scripts/validate_insights.js && node scripts/validate_fanout_warning.js && node scripts/validate_answer_coverage.js && node scripts/validate_entity_coverage.js && node scripts/validate_internal_links.js && node scripts/validate_sitemap_coverage.js
scripts.validate:autonomous: npm run validate:atom-contract && npm run validate:page-family-contract && npm run validate:page-admission && npm run validate:query-atlas && npm run validate:programmatic-engine && npm run validate:workflow-data-trace && npm run validate:master-contract-pipeline
scripts.validate:governance: node scripts/validate_strategy_gate.js && node scripts/validate_master_plan_completion.js && node scripts/validate_validator_registry.js && node scripts/validate_canonical_routes.js && node scripts/validate_priority_pages.js && node scripts/validate_homepage_ctas.js && node scripts/validate_backlink_remediation.js && node scripts/validate_release_plan.js && npm run validate:autonomous
